Interface IEpipolarXform

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control epipolar transformation.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("461761C2-2C6B-4D28-A458-B8B7A5720073")]
public interface IEpipolarXform : IGeodataXform
